session.user:
Run prettier --write on these 4 files and report the results: 1. docs/learned/architecture/remote-github-gateway.md 2. docs/learned/cli/checkout-teleport-split.md 3. docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md 4. docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
Just run the command and report results. Do not modify any files other than through prettier.
session.assistant: I'll run prettier on these 4 files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run prettier formatting on 4 markdown files

session.assistant:
**prettier passed**: All 4 files formatted successfully.
- docs/learned/architecture/remote-github-gateway.md (69ms) - docs/learned/cli/checkout-teleport-split.md (20ms) - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md (20ms) - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md (22ms)
Total execution time: 131ms
